title: A New Guy at the Station
article_text: A new guy enters the train station every morning. He always respects the various people at the station. His main function is to check the size of bags. This behavior is an important addition to the safety rules. Yesterday, he saw an image of a lost cat. The population of the city is significant, so the station is busy. He can catch a player who fails to follow the rules. The environment of the station is clean, thus people feel good. He never works alone during the production of the morning report. A contract for his job is on the table, and he can sign it today.

sentences.en: A new guy enters the train station every morning.
sentences.zh: 一个新家伙每天早上进入火车站。

words.eng_def: a place where trains or buses stop

sentences.en: He always respects the various people at the station.
sentences.zh: 他总是尊重车站里的各种各样的人。

words.eng_def: to treat someone in a good way

sentences.en: His main function is to check the size of bags.
sentences.zh: 他的主要功能是检查包的大小。

words.eng_def: the purpose or job of someone or something
how big or small something is

sentences.en: This behavior is an important addition to the safety rules.
sentences.zh: 这种行为是对安全规则的一个重要补充。

sentences.en: Yesterday, he saw an image of a lost cat.
sentences.zh: 昨天，他看到了一张丢失猫的图片。

sentences.en: The population of the city is significant, so the station is busy.
sentences.zh: 这个城市的人口数量很大，所以车站很繁忙。

words.eng_def: the number of people living in a place
large or important enough to be noticed

sentences.en: He can catch a player who fails to follow the rules.
sentences.zh: 他能抓住一个不遵守规则的玩家。

words.eng_def: to take hold of someone or something
a person who plays a game or sport
to not succeed or not do something

sentences.en: The environment of the station is clean, thus people feel good.
sentences.zh: 车站的环境很干净，因此人们感觉很好。

words.eng_def: the surroundings or conditions around us

sentences.en: He never works alone during the production of the morning report.
sentences.zh: 他在制作早间报告时从不独自工作。

sentences.en: A contract for his job is on the table, and he can sign it today.
sentences.zh: 一份他的工作合同在桌子上，他今天可以签。

words.eng_def: a legal agreement between people or groups
an opinion or remark about something

vocabulary.eng_def: a legal agreement between people or groups
a person who plays a game or sport
an opinion or remark about something

vocabulary.eng_def: to go into a place
to happen
without other people
large or important enough to be noticed

quiz.question_en: What is the closest meaning of 'significant'?
What is the Chinese translation of 'contract'?

image_prompts: A young guy walking into a busy train station in the morning.
The guy smiling and greeting various people at the station.
The guy checking the size of a passenger's bag with a measuring tool.
A sign showing 'New Safety Addition' with a list of rules.
The guy looking at a lost cat image on a poster from yesterday.
A large crowd of people at a city station, showing a big population.
The guy catching a player who is running with a ball in the station.
A clean and bright station environment with happy people.
The guy working alone at a desk, producing a morning report.
A contract on a table with a pen, and the guy ready to sign.
